UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Stores the vocabulary progress and stats for a user.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

wordStatus.description: A map of word IDs to their mastery status (mastered, familiar, unfamiliar).

missionsFinished.description: The total number of missions completed by the user.

selectedBankId.description: The ID of the last selected word bank.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp of the last progress update.

/users/{uid}.description: The progress data for a specific user.
